explainability.path_to_improvement: Document how explanations are provided to users affected by AI decisions.

external_accountability.path_to_improvement: Obtain external validation of AI practices or require vendor certifications.

fairness.path_to_improvement: Document bias testing procedures or vendor AI fairness requirements.

governance.findings: The Ryan Homes Terms and Conditions document references applicable laws and its Privacy Policy. This indicates adherence to regulatory frameworks.
governance.path_to_improvement: Name an AI governance body with defined mandate covering all AI use.

relevant_sources.summary: The Ryan Homes Terms and Conditions document provides evidence for the **governance** and **privacy** pillars. It supports governance by referencing "applicable laws" and its "Privacy Policy," indicating adherence to regulatory frameworks. The document also supports privacy by explicitly stating that users consent to the use of AI and automated technologies for recording, transcribing, analyzing, and storing communications, which implies data handling practices.
relevant_sources.title: Ryan Homes Terms and Conditions - AI in Communications Disclosure

oversight.path_to_improvement: Document human review processes for AI-assisted decisions (built or vendor AI).

privacy.findings: The Ryan Homes Terms and Conditions document states that users consent to the use of AI and automated technologies for recording, transcribing, analyzing, and storing communications. This document also references data handling practices related to these technologies.
privacy.path_to_improvement: Publish AI-specific privacy impact assessments or data handling procedures.

relevant_sources.summary: The Ryan Homes Terms and Conditions document provides evidence for the **governance** and **privacy** pillars. It supports governance by referencing "applicable laws" and its "Privacy Policy," indicating adherence to regulatory frameworks. The document also supports privacy by explicitly stating that users consent to the use of AI and automated technologies for recording, transcribing, analyzing, and storing communications, which implies data handling practices.
relevant_sources.title: Ryan Homes Terms and Conditions - AI in Communications Disclosure

transparency.path_to_improvement: Document AI systems in use, including vendor/third-party AI tools.

summary.overall_findings: NVR's Ryan Homes Terms and Conditions document states that users consent to the use of AI and automated technologies for recording and transcribing communications. This practice is part of the documented evidence for privacy, one of two responsible AI pillars addressed in its public disclosures. Additionally, governance materials reference applicable laws and the company's Privacy Policy, drawing from 3 publicly available sources. No qualifying public evidence was found for the majority of the 7 evaluated pillars.
